section.title: NAME
section.p: getRG - Return the quotation of a replset.

section.title: DESCRIPTION
section.p: Return the quotation of a replset.

plentry.pd: Replset name. Replset names are unique to each other in a database object.

Replset id. The system will automatically generate a replset id.
Format The method "getRG()" contains "name" or "id". The type of "name" is string. The type of "id" is "int". It the replset specified by "name" or "id" doesn't exist, operation exception will occur. ("<Replset name>"|<id>)

ul.li: The value of "name" should not contain null string, "." or "$". The length of it should not be greater than 127B.

section.title: Examples
section.p: Specify the value of "name", the returnthe quotation of replset "rg1".
Specify the value of "id", the returnthe quotation of replset "rg1".
